project.name: TuLector
project.inspiration: sistema de referencia (OMR scanner for education)

step_1_capture.name: Camera frame capture
step_1_capture.rotation_handling: Device rotation applied via Camera2 interop

step_2_corner_detection.name: 4-corner square detection
step_2_corner_detection.technology: Contour detection + quadrant classification in native C++
step_2_corner_detection.purpose: Locate the 4 black corner squares on the answer sheet

step_3_perspective_correction.name: Perspective warp
step_3_perspective_correction.purpose: Flatten the paper image regardless of camera angle

step_4_bubble_classification.name: SVM-based mark detection
step_4_bubble_classification.technology: Support Vector Machine with 3 specialized models

svmcombo.purpose: Combination answers (up to 3 letters, 31 possible combinations)

svmglare.purpose: Glare/bright light detection per bubble region

step_5_ocr.name: Student ID OCR
step_5_ocr.technology: Bubble grid reading in native C++
step_5_ocr.purpose: Read student ID number from bubble matrix
step_5_ocr.code_reference: SheetReader.java:83 GetEncodedGrade returns CSV with ID

libmixed_sample.so.purpose: Core grading algorithm: corner detection, perspective correction, SVM classification, OCR

libimage_processing_util_jni.so.purpose: Image format conversion: YUV→RGB, rotation, pixel shift, JPEG write

libsurface_util_jni.so.purpose: Surface rendering utilities for Android camera pipeline

process_byte_frame_protocol.signature: native int ProcessByteFrame(int width, int height, byte[] yuvData, int[] trackingArray, int focusReq, int rotation, int brightDetect, int strictMode, int rectLeft, int rectTop, int rectRight, int rectBottom)

auto_scan_logic.mechanism: Every frame is analyzed. When ProcessByteFrame returns 1, CompleteProcess is called, then ReturnGradedPaper

subscription_drm.method: JNI call GetRequestToken with device-specific string

tulector_implementation.no_external_dependencies: Pure Canvas 2D API - no OpenCV.js, no WASM, no native modules

step_1_capture.name: Camera frame capture
step_1_capture.resolution: Native camera resolution, processed at video dimensions

step_2_corner_detection.name: 4-corner square detection
step_2_corner_detection.algorithm: 1. Convert RGBA to grayscale → 2. Otsu threshold → 3. Flood-fill all dark blobs → 4. Filter by area/aspect ratio → 5. Pick best blob per quadrant (closest to image corner)

step_3_perspective_correction.name: Perspective warp
step_3_perspective_correction.technology: 8-DOF homography solved via Gaussian elimination (pure TypeScript)
step_3_perspective_correction.algorithm: 1. Build 8x8 linear system from 4 point correspondences → 2. Gaussian elimination with partial pivoting → 3. Inverse pixel mapping on RGBA buffer

step_4_bubble_analysis.name: Bubble grid analysis
step_4_bubble_analysis.technology: Adaptive threshold + contrast ratio (simplified from SVM approach)
step_4_bubble_analysis.algorithm: For each bubble region: extract 20x20px ROI → calculate dark pixel ratio at threshold 128 → adaptive threshold = max(0.10, max_score * 0.35) → pick bubbles above threshold

step_5_student_id.name: Student ID reading
step_5_student_id.technology: Bubble grid reading on warped image
step_5_student_id.algorithm: Extract ROI per ID bubble → dark pixel ratio > 0.12 → binary digit

auto_scan_features.frame_stability: Requires 12 consecutive frames with valid corners + sharp focus before auto-triggering scan
auto_scan_features.focus_detection: Laplacian variance threshold > 40 (simple edge detection without OpenCV)

layout_configuration.comment: Must match between sheet generator and scanner

tulector_flutter_mobile.reference: omr_reference.json + port 1:1 de src/lib/omr.ts (NO copia codigo del APK)
tulector_flutter_mobile.runtime: Flutter 3 + Dart FFI + C++17 (libomr_engine.so / iOS static link)
tulector_flutter_mobile.no_external_dependencies: Sin OpenCV. Misma logica que omr.ts: classifyBubble multi-feature, validateFormat, checkCurve, codigos SCAN_CODES

step_1_capture.name: Camera frame capture
step_1_capture.format: YUV420 convertido a NV21 en Dart

step_2_corner_detection.name: 4-corner detection
step_2_corner_detection.technology: Centro de masa pixeles Y<80 en zonas 8%x6% (igual que omr.ts simplificado, no flood-fill)

step_3_perspective_correction.name: Perspective warp
step_3_perspective_correction.technology: Homografia 8-DOF + eliminacion gaussiana + mapeo inverso bilineal

step_4_bubble_analysis.name: Bubble grading
step_4_bubble_analysis.technology: ROI 16x16, oscuro si (R+G+B)/3<80, umbral adaptativo max(0.10, max*0.35)

auto_scan_features.focus_detection: Laplacian variance Y>40 en Dart (paridad web)

corner_detection.sistema de referencia: Native C++ contour detection with morphological close
corner_detection.tulector: Pure JS flood-fill connected components with quadrant scoring
corner_detection.pros_sistema de referencia: More robust to noise, handles double-border corners
corner_detection.pros_tulector: Zero dependencies, runs in browser, 15ms per frame

bubble_classification.sistema de referencia: 3 SVM models trained on thousands of real answer sheets
bubble_classification.tulector: Adaptive threshold with dark pixel ratio
bubble_classification.pros_sistema de referencia: Handles partial erasures, faint marks, different lighting, pen vs pencil
bubble_classification.pros_tulector: Deterministic, no training data needed, 3ms per bubble

platform.sistema de referencia: Native Android only, requires APK install
platform.tulector_web: Any browser, install-free, iOS + Android + Desktop
platform.tulector_flutter: APK/IPA nativo, camara optimizada, mismo layout 1200x1650 que web

corners.tulector_web: Flood-fill + cuadrantes (JSON describe Otsu; codigo usa Y<80)
corners.tulector_flutter: C++ centro de masa Y<80 (alineado a omr.ts actual)

performance.tulector_flutter: Isolate + nativo; objetivo gama media Snapdragon 600

robustness_improvements_planned: Multi-frame voting for answer consensus (already have frame stability)
Web Worker for perspective warp to avoid UI blocking
Progressive Web App (PWA) for offline use
Glare detection via local histogram analysis (like svmglare.model)

frontend.auto_deploy: GitHub push to master triggers build

file_structure.src/app/sheet/page.tsx: Answer sheet generator (SVG preview + Canvas PNG download)
file_structure.src/lib/omr.ts: Core OMR engine (findCorners, warpPerspective, gradeBubbles, readStudentId)
